What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
S
Sarah M.

Professional General Works completely transformed my outdated kitchen! They listened to my ideas, offered helpful suggestions, and delivered a stunning result. The new cabinets and countertops are exactly what I wanted. The team was professional, respectful, and always on time. Highly recommend!

J
John B.

We hired Professional General Works to remodel our master bathroom. The initial design process was smooth, and the team was very responsive to our needs. There were a couple of minor delays due to material availability, but they communicated clearly and kept us informed. The finished bathroom looks fantastic!

E
Emily K.

Undertaking a whole-house remodel seemed daunting, but Professional General Works made the process manageable and stress-free. They helped us create a beautiful and functional living space that perfectly suits our family's needs. Their attention to detail and commitment to quality are truly impressive.

D
David L.

Professional General Works built an amazing deck for our backyard. It's the perfect place to relax and entertain. They used high-quality materials, and the workmanship is excellent. We're so happy with the result!

Additional Home Remodeler Services

Professional General Works — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every home remodeler project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Professional General Works Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific home remodeler needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Jacksonville & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Jacksonville, FL and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

St. Augustine Orange Park Jacksonville Fernandina Beach Ponte Vedra Beach Neptune Beach Atlantic Beach Jacksonville Beach
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our home remodeler services.

How long does a typical kitchen remodel take?

The timeline varies depending on the scope of the project, but most kitchen remodels take between 6-12 weeks.

Do I need to move out during the remodel?

While it's not always necessary, many homeowners find it more comfortable to relocate during the demolition and construction phases.

What kind of warranty do you offer on your work?

We offer a comprehensive warranty on all our labor and materials, ensuring your peace of mind.

Built on Jacksonville Values

Get a free consultation and discover the possibilities for your Jacksonville home.

Let's Begin →
